name: Web Reliability
description: Standard for handling mechanism failures — retries, recovery strategies, and resilience patterns — across any operation (HTTP, database, computation, async tasks). A registry of recovery handlers tried in priority order; the first that accepts the error owns the recovery. Distinct from validation: reliability handles system failures, not input invalidity.
tierEvidence: Frontier UI ships the recovery-handler registry at reliability/provider.ts + registry.ts + reliabilityConformance.ts — a shipped, functional constellation consumer of the reliability protocol.
